name: Serge Koussevitzky
description: Russian and American conductor, composer, and double-bassist (1874–1951)
abstract: Serge Koussevitzky (born Sergey Aleksandrovich Kusevitsky; Russian: Сергей Александрович Кусевицкий, IPA: [sʲɪrˈɡʲej ɐlʲɪkˈsandrəvʲɪtɕ kʊsʲɪˈvʲitskʲɪj];  26 July [O.S. 14 July] 1874 – 4 June 1951) was a Russian and American conductor, composer, and double-bassist, known for his long tenure as music director of the Boston Symphony Orchest…

about_quotes.speaker: Schuller Gunther
about_quotes.evidence: There are the classical symphony concerts there, and then there was the school that Aaron Copland and Serge Koussevitzky created.
